form.title: Login

form.nameMinChars: Name should have at least 3 characters.

form.usernameMaxChars: Username should not have more than 12 characters.

accountVerify.title: Almost there! Verify your account
accountVerify.description: It's necessary that you verify your account before you can start using it. An e-mail will be sent to you with the verification link.

success.title: E-mail verified!
success.description: You can now log in on the platform.

failed.title: An error occoured during verification.
failed.description: Try again requesting a new verification link.

onFail.title: Error while sending email
onFail.description: An unknown error happened while sending the email. Please wait for a few moments then try again

passwordReset.title: Reset password
passwordReset.description: To reset your password, an email containing a password reset link will be sent to you. Type your email below:

validation.passwordMinChars: Password should have at least 8 characters.

onSuccess.title: Password reset!
onSuccess.description: You can now log in with your new password.

onFail.title: Invalid URL
onFail.description: You are using an invalid password reset link. It's likely that the URL has expired. Please try requesting the password reset email again.

verifyAccount.subject: Email Verification
verifyAccount.title: Almost there!
verifyAccount.description: To verify your account on MPost, follow
verifyAccount.unknownError: Unknown error while sending confirmation e-mail.

resetPassword.subject: Password Reset
resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.description: To continue and reset your password, follow
resetPassword.ignoreEmail: If you didn't request this email, please ignore it.
resetPassword.couldntSendEmail: Could not send verification e-mail. Please try again later.
